su_email_stat: Email indicator

SAS Format: $ESTATF

N: No, no email identiﬁed for enrollee

Y: Yes, email identiﬁed for enrollee

su_mode: Survey Data Collection Mode

SAS Format: $MODEF

I: INBOUND CATI

M: MAIL

N: NA

O: OUTBOUND CATI

W: WEB
